subcodes.first_line: Following praise unto the Pure and All-Knowing One, the Exalter of the celestial spheres and Purifier of the earthly realm, it is submitted that this sphere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پس از حمد دانای پاک و رافع افلاک و طاهرکننده مقام خاک عرض میشود که این کره
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
